subtitle_en: Epsom salt is pure magnesium for your everyday well-being!
description_en:
Epsom salt (magnesium sulfate) helps you recover from stressful moments, relaxes the muscles and supports the nervous system. It improves sleep and concentration and replenishes the body's magnesium reserves.

It is excellent for baths, foot baths or skin care, relieves fatigue and makes the skin soft.

Using it is simple: add 750 g of Epsom salt to the bath water and enjoy 20 minutes of relaxing rest (this is the optimal absorption time through the skin). For a foot bath, 250 g of salt is enough.

Our Epsom salt is laboratory tested and of pure origin from Germany, suitable also for sensitive skin!

Choose a suitable amount and order conveniently to your home, to a parcel machine, or pick it up yourself at Hingamiskeskus.

If you have any questions, write or call us, we are happy to help!
meta_description_en: Epsom salt 250g, natural magnesium sulfate to support the heart, circulation and well-being. Ideal for baths and skin care. Order Epsom salt 250g online today!

title_en: Hingamiskeskus gift card 40 € floating and breathwork in Tallinn
alt_en: Hingamiskeskus gift card 40 € floating and breathwork in Tallinn
description_en:
We will send the gift card to you by email. If you would like us to send the gift card in physical form, let us know and we will send it to your chosen parcel machine.

Who is the gift card for?

The gift card is perfect for a friend, family member or colleague who needs a moment for themselves. A great gift for a birthday, Christmas or simply as a token of appreciation.

What can you get with the gift card?

40€ gift card = 1 floating session OR 1 group breathing session
80€ gift card = 2 sessions (choose floating or breathing)
120€ gift card = 3 sessions (choose your own combination)

The gift card is valid for 6 months.

Who is this gift card suitable for?

This gift card is ideal for a person whose everyday life is full of haste and responsibility and who finds it hard to truly switch off. It suits an office worker, a young mother, a student or an entrepreneur who feels they need a break to recharge their batteries.

It is also a good choice for someone who has already tried meditation, yoga or other self-care methods but wants to experience something new and more deeply restorative.


What will the recipient experience?

During floating, the body is as if in a weightless state and muscle tension has a chance to soften, the mind calms and the nervous system deeply relaxes. Learn about floating here www.hingamiskeskus.ee/en/floating

A breathwork session helps release tension that has accumulated in the body and breath over time, create inner clarity and feel lighter and more focused after the session. Learn about breathwork here www.hingamiskeskus.ee/en/breathwork
meta_title_en: Gift card 40€ – Floating and breathwork | Hingamiskeskus
meta_description_en: Hingamiskeskus gift card 40€ for floating and breathwork in Tallinn. The perfect gift! Sent by email or printed. Valid for 6 months. Order today!

subtitle_en: A calm trial period with floating and breathing.
description_en:
We offer the option to buy a 3-session card, with which you save 11% off the price of individual sessions.

The card can be used flexibly for both floating sessions and breathwork (breathing therapy) sessions. Before each visit you choose which experience you need at that moment.

If you have not floated before, see a short explanation here: www.hingamiskeskus.ee/en/floating. There you will find information on how floating in salt water helps the nervous system calm down and the body relax deeply.

You can read more about breathwork here: www.hingamiskeskus.ee/en/breathwork. It explains how conscious breathing helps you gradually release tension, exhaustion and emotional load.

After purchasing the package, please create an account in the Hopitude system: app.hopitude.com/en/signup

Once the account is created, we will automatically link your purchased package to your account so you can conveniently book and use sessions.


If you have any questions, write or call us. We are happy to help you choose a suitable time or your first experience.

The card is valid for 3 months.
meta_description_en: Buy a 3-session card and save off the price of individual sessions. Use it flexibly for floating and breathwork. Valid for 3 months. Book your time today!

meta_description_en: Buy a 10-session card and save off the price of individual sessions. Use it flexibly for floating and breathwork. Valid for 10 months. Book your time today!

description_en:
MONEY-BACK GUARANTEE!
If you have tried the first session and feel the package is not for you, you get your money back.

The package includes:

  • 3 sessions, choose yourself whether you want to come for a 1-hour floating or a 2-hour group breathing session. (The 3 visits of the trial package cannot be used for only one procedure; you must choose either 2 breathing and 1 floating, or the other way around.)
    Floating offers deep relaxation in a gravity-free environment that helps relieve stress, muscle tension and mental fatigue.
    Group breathing helps release tension stored in the body, supports emotional balance and deep recovery.


More information about floating:

www.hingamiskeskus.ee/en/floating

More information about breathwork:
www.hingamiskeskus.ee/en/breathwork

Conditions:

  • The package is intended only for new clients as a trial.

  • All three sessions must be used within 1 month of the first visit.

  • The package can be purchased only once per person.

  • Unused sessions expire after 1 month. An unactivated package expires within 6 months.

  • The package is personal and cannot be shared with household members or friends.

Special price: 75 € (regular price 120 €)

If you have any questions, write to us, we are happy to help!
meta_title_en: Body and mind 3x trial package | Hingamiskeskus
meta_description_en: Body and mind 3x trial package, try floating and breathing at a special price. The perfect first experience. Money-back guarantee! Book your time today!

description_en:
Do you want to experience complete relaxation and restore the balance of your body and mind? The deep relaxation package combines floating and breathwork into one experience that helps you relax deeply and release tension.

1 hour of floating, the body and mind rest in a weightless state. The magnesium-rich water relaxes the muscles, reduces stress and creates a calm state that is the ideal preparation for breathing therapy.

A private breathing session right after floating, guided breathwork leads to deeper self-awareness, releases tension accumulated in the body and helps achieve inner balance.

Why choose this package?
Floating relaxes the body, breathing frees the mind.
Supports deeper sleep and better concentration.
Helps relieve stress, anxiety and physical tension.
A private session that can be experienced alone or with a loved one.

Price:
One person 150€
Two people 250€

After purchasing the package, contact us and we will agree on suitable times for the sessions.

If you have any questions, we are always ready to help.

NB. Gift cards do not apply to this package!
meta_title_en: Deep relaxation package – Floating and breathwork | Hingamiskeskus
meta_description_en: The deep relaxation package combines floating and breathwork. Release tension, restore your body balance and experience deep relaxation at Hingamiskeskus. Book today!

description_en:
The well-being package is for you if you want to feel a deeper lightness in both body and mind. Already after the third floating you will start to notice how tension in the body subsides and a sense of calm grows. Personal breathing sessions with a consultation help release anxiety, reduce stress and restore inner balance. The combined effect of these two creates a holistic experience that supports both physical relaxation and mental well-being.

The package includes:

  • 3x floating, deep relaxation in a gravity-free environment that reduces stress, tension and fatigue.

  • 2x individual breathing sessions with a consultation, a personal approach that helps find inner balance and mental clarity.

After purchasing the package, contact us and we will agree on suitable times for the sessions.

If you have any questions, we are always ready to help.
meta_title_en: Well-being package – Floating and breathwork | Hingamiskeskus
meta_description_en: The well-being package includes floating and breathing sessions to relieve stress and find inner peace. Start your well-being journey at Hingamiskeskus today!

description_en:
MONEY-BACK GUARANTEE!
If you have tried the first session and feel the package is not for you, you get your money back.

The morning energy boost is created precisely for those moments when sleep has not been enough and you need a quick physical and mental lift. It helps the nervous system calm down, which creates a clearer and more stable feeling for the whole workday. This package can help shift workers, parents, and anyone whose night's sleep has not been ideal but who wants a good start to the day.

Who is it for?
* Poor sleep quality or too little sleep
* Early waking or a difficult morning
* Stress and fatigue that need a quick solution

The package includes:

* 5 floating sessions (60 min) at a special price (125€, regular price 200€)
* Sessions are available starting at 8:30, 9:00 and 10:00, Monday to Friday.

Package conditions:
* All five sessions must be used within 2 months of the first visit
* The package is personal and cannot be shared with household members or friends.
* The package becomes valid from the first use. An unactivated package expires within 6 months.

More information about floating:
www.hingamiskeskus.ee/en/floating
meta_description_en: The morning energy boost helps the nervous system calm down and gives a quick physical and mental lift. Money-back guarantee! Book your time at Hingamiskeskus today!
